form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 3rd over 435m at Sale beaten 1.1 lengths (24.68) behind Hay Riley in a Grade 5 on April 5. Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 460m in 26.35 last start, beating Pacific Lola. Can continue the winning form.

formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 460m in 26.35 last start, beating Pacific Lola. Can continue the winning form.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 390m at Ballarat by 2.75 lengths in a Grade 5. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (26.61) in a Rank Limit - Grade 5, finishing a 7 length fifth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (44.21) when sixth over 730m at The Meadows in a Special conditions race. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Others appear better placed.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (26.60) over 460m at this track. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 5th in a Free For All on March 18 over 525m at The Meadows behind Zipping Singh beaten 4.5 lengths (30.68). Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by 1.75 lengths at Horsham (23.40) beating Black Statesman in a Grade 5 on March 24. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.
